name: ValuesOfMultipleObjects
shortDescription: Aggregate min/max/average position, size, Z-order across picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: MinX
eventsFunctions.fullName: Minimum X position of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Minimum X position of picked object instances (using AABB of objects).

eventsFunctions.name: MaxX
eventsFunctions.fullName: Maximum X position of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Maximum X position of picked object instances (using AABB of objects).

eventsFunctions.name: MinY
eventsFunctions.fullName: Minimum Y position of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Minimum Y position of picked object instances (using AABB of objects).

eventsFunctions.name: MaxY
eventsFunctions.fullName: Maximum Y position of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Maximum Y position of picked object instances (using AABB of objects).

eventsFunctions.name: MinZOrder
eventsFunctions.fullName: Minimum Z order of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Minimum Z order of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxZOrder
eventsFunctions.fullName: Maximum Z order of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Maximum Z order of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageZOrder
eventsFunctions.fullName: Average Z order of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Average Z order of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AbsoluteCenterOfObjectsX
eventsFunctions.fullName: X center point (absolute) of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: X center point (absolute) of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AbsoluteCenterOfObjectsY
eventsFunctions.fullName: Y center point (absolute) of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Y center point (absolute) of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageCenterOfObjectsX
eventsFunctions.fullName: X center point (average) of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: X center point (average) of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageCenterOfObjectsY
eventsFunctions.fullName: Y center point (average) of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Y center point (average) of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: MinHeight
eventsFunctions.fullName: Min object height of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Min object height of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxHeight
eventsFunctions.fullName: Max object height of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Max object height of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageHeight
eventsFunctions.fullName: Average height of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Average height of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: MinWidth
eventsFunctions.fullName: Min object width of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Min object width of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxWidth
eventsFunctions.fullName: Max object width of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Max object width of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageWidth
eventsFunctions.fullName: Average width of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Average width of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageForceX
eventsFunctions.fullName: Average horizontal force (X) of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Average horizontal force (X) of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageForceY
eventsFunctions.fullName: Average vertical force (Y) of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Average vertical force (Y) of picked object instances.

eventsFunctions.name: AverageAngle
eventsFunctions.fullName: Average angle of rotation of picked object instances
eventsFunctions.description: Average angle of rotation of picked object instances.

description:
Provides values based on picked object instances: minimum or average X or Y position, center position, width, height, 2D Z-order.  
Useful for camera tracking, flocking behaviors, and more.

An example shows how to use the extension ([open the Itch.io page](https://victrisgames.itch.io/values-of-multiple-objects)).
